description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a hidden .test-crate template job and a .publish-crate job that extends it. In the test stage, .test-crate runs a before_script with "rustc --version --verbose", "cargo --version --verbose", sets COMPVER="$CI_JOB_NAME", extracts COMPONENT as the directory name of COMPVER and VERSION as the suffix, and is marked interruptible. Its script echoes "Testing component ${COMPONENT:?cannot be empty} v ${VERSION:?cannot be empty}", runs "cargo publish --manifest-path \"$COMPONENT/Cargo.toml\" --dry-run --color always", then "cargo test --manifest-path \"$COMPONENT/Cargo.toml\" --release --no-default-features --color always", "cargo test --manifest-path \"$COMPONENT/Cargo.toml\" --release --all-features --color always", and finally checks that "$VERSION" matches the version from "cargo pkgid --manifest-path \"$COMPONENT/Cargo.toml\"". In the release stage, .publish-crate inherits the same before_script, sets interruptible to false, and its script echoes "Releasing component ${COMPONENT:?cannot be empty} v ${VERSION:?cannot be empty}" then runs "cargo publish --manifest-path \"$COMPONENT/Cargo.toml\" --no-verify --token \"$CRATES_KEY\" --color always"; it is manual (when: manual). No specific Docker image or services are defined, so the default runner image is used.
